calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Jul-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment And Set Aside Original Defulat Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Jacqueline Akioyame's unopposed Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment And Set Aside Original Default Judgment is GRANTED.

Defendant moves under Code of Civil Procedure section 473(d). Section 473(d) provides: "The court may, upon motion of the injured party, or its own motion, correct clerical mistakes in its judgment or orders as entered, so as to conform to the judgment or order directed, and may, on motion of either party after notice to the other party, set aside any void judgment or order."

The preponderance of the evidence indicates the judgment is void. Good cause appearing, the court orders the 6/28/2016 judgment and 1/5/2026 renewal of judgment vacated. The matter is returned to the master calendar.

Moving Party shall prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
